title: UX Designer
description: We're looking for a UX Designer who obsesses over craft and empathy. You'll lead end-to-end design for key product areas, shaping experiences that are intuitive, accessible, and visually refined.
responsibilities: Lead UX research including user interviews, usability tests, and surveys
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs in Figma
Partner with product managers to align design work with business goals
Champion accessibility and inclusive design principles across the product
Contribute to and maintain the company's design system
requirements: Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
Experience conducting user research and translating insights into design decisions
nice_to_have: Experience designing for mobile-first or native iOS/Android apps

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We're hiring a Senior DevOps Engineer to own and evolve our cloud infrastructure. You'll ensure our platform is secure, reliable, and able to scale with our rapid growth.
responsibilities: Design and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and CloudFormation
Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines to support fast, reliable deployments
Monitor system health, respond to incidents, and drive post-mortems
Implement security best practices and manage access controls
Collaborate with engineering teams to optimize performance and reduce costs
requirements: 5+ years of DevOps or infrastructure engineering experience
Deep hands-on experience with AWS (EC2, RDS, EKS, S3, IAM)
Experience with Docker and Kubernetes in production
Strong scripting skills in Bash or Python
nice_to_have: Experience with service mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd)
